funFacts: The Dolphin Sunset Leap frequently plays in the wake of boats and jumps out of the water to look around or shed parasites.
Dolphin Sunset Leaps are smart marine mammals that sleep with one eye open and half of their brain awake to watch for sharks and breathe.
